argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/web/api/mix/list/?status=0,1,2,3,6&count=' + limit + '&cursor=0&should_query_new_mix=1&device_platform=web&aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); const items = (res.mix_list ?? []).map(m => ({ mix_id: m.mix_id, name: m.mix_name, item_count: m.item_count })); return items; }
